title: GOUG - [Good Optimize & Util Mods for your Game]
description: Modpack with useful and optimized mods without affecting your vanilla experience
body:
# What is G.O.U.G? ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c4s1kqYM/images/2f91a75d35346592a683ba64f926683bbe2c8797.jpeg)

Good optimised and useful modifications for your game, or better known as G.O.U.G is a Fabric modpack that seeks to offer a different improvement to other modpacks that already exist at our disposal.

G.O.U.G offers a good optimisation for your game from different areas such as chunk loading, menus, entities, textures, etc. But it not only offers optimisations for performance and our FPS, it also offers several tools that can help you in your game without the need to modify too much what we know as vanilla. Among these tools we will find one that will remind veterans of the great MC Edit, animations and changes of skins and layers, improvements in the key assignment menu, better statistics for the player, texture for the lore of the items very different from vanilla, and much more.

--- Below you will find the list of all the possible features that G.O.U.G adds (I just hope I have added all of them since they are quite a lot hehe...).
  • Maybe work with some custom GUI/Entities textures.
  • Custom skin in the game.
  • 3D skins.
  • Smooth items movements.
  • Custom capes in game.
  • Animated capes.
  • Fast language menu.
  • Better keys control.
  • Mouse Tweaks.
  • Beautiful GUI from Legendary Tooltips.
  • Special detailed samples for rare or special items.
  • Better sodium options.
  • Shaders... the beautiful shaders...
  • Some friendly help if the game crashed.
  • No more custom world advice.
  • Better dropped items (say goodbye to Item Physic).
  • Better recipe book! (say goodbye to JEI & REI).
  • Custom F3.
  • Wait... chat features from Microsoft are causing lag in some worlds or servers?
  • Chunk loading improvement.
  • Better entity culling.
  • If you return to the main menu and connect again to a server, your history commands in the chat will not delete.
  • See more chunks that the server allow.
  • YEAH!! Journey map for fabric guys!
  • Dynamic lights.
  • Memory improvements.
  • No chat report :)
  • Custom zoom distance.
  • Connected glass and other blocks.
  • Player head in the chat (work for no premium & premium).
  • Some bug fixes & just fixes about servers packets connectivity.
  • Compressed xp orbs.
  • Clickable advancements.
  • Reduce FPS when you're AFK.
  • Blur.
  • Better player HUD.
  • Item model fix.
  • Some improvements when game starts.
  • Better biome blend.
  • More info in the advancements.
--- ### Mod list - The G.O.U.G mod list has several differences due to compatibility and availability between each version, the modpack is available for each minecraft version. - Even so, they can read that information in the change logs of each version to be downloaded. --- ### Available versions
Fabric - Above 1.17
Forge? You have to accept it, fabric is better optimised than forge for these latest versions. So, I'm not interested to do a forge version of the modpack (for now).
--- # IMPORTANT - READ!
GOUG 1.1.6 version is the latest modpack version for: 1.19.1 - 1.19 - 1.18.1
GOUG 1.2 version is the latest modpack version for: 1.17.1 - 1.18.2 - 1.19.2 - 1.19.3
GOUG 1.5 version is the ONLY and the latest modpack version for: 1.19.4
GOUG currently working & updating for: +1.20.1
--- ### List of each mod used in the assigned modpack by category and version, including license type and author links - Coming soon --- Guys, It is not so easy to update these type of modpack. So... Just being patience please. **God bless** and have a beautiful week :) ---
